rules.rotateAttack: An attack reactivation may rotate one quarter-turn immediately before the attack for the same one reactivation cost, consuming both the attack slot and rotation slot.
rules.rotateOnly: Rotation remains once per creature per turn and costs the same as reactivation.
rules.summonAttack: Rotate-attack is not applied to summon attacks.
rules.items: not implemented in the v3.1 pure-body freeze

measurementAdditions.failedCheckResponseWinRate: For each player with at least one failed 4-check response in a game, record whether that player eventually won; reported beside check-return player win rate.

assumptions.seedPolicy: Center and robustness runs use the v3 freeze seed sequence (seed + gameIndex * 9176).
assumptions.gateJudgement: not made by this script; values are reported as decision material only
